occupation: Business Sales Director at Outernet London
headline: Business Sales Director - Outernet Global
summary: Sales Manager with 10 years experience in the world of Out of Home advertising.

experiences.title: Business Sales Manager
experiences.description:
Outernet London is launching in the heart of Soho in November 2021. It's the first in a global network of super-high vision immersive media and live events Districts, set up to deliver multi-sensory, evocative and memorable experiences for Brands.
The future of connected Retail, Media and Entertainment will be home to the world's largest wrap-around screens as well as 250,000 square feet of premium retail and leisure space, including restaurants, studios and live music venues, making it a new cultural and entertainment hub at the centre of London.

experiences.title: Head of Agency Relations
experiences.description:
At Project11, we offer unrivalled access to advertising opportunities at the world’s top sporting events. We are best known for our rights in English and Spanish football through our platform of LED perimeter boards and exciting sponsorship opportunities, featuring the biggest and richest clubs in the world.

Following seven successful years in Airport advertising I joined Project11 to head up a newly created agency division.  The sole reason being to enable us to work with the world's largest brands through developing strong and reliable relationships with agencies across the globe.  My responsibilities include creating the strategy for becoming known amongst the agencies, identifying opportunities for their clients and creating the necessary commercial agreements with the investment teams. 

An incredibly challenging and rewarding role, I have managed to grow our reputation of being the number one perimeter board supplier, while securing preferred supplier status amongst a host of agencies and specialists within my first 6 months.

experiences.title: Group Business Director on Airports and International
experiences.description:
With Global's acquisition of Primesight I was promoted to Group Business Director across all Airport and International business.

Managing a team of six my role is to oversee all business into Global's Airports, along with all business across Global's entire outdoor inventory that stems from International budgets. 

Along with managing senior level relationships within agency & specialist, I am also responsible for forecasting, revenue generation within my team and educating other Global sales teams on the value of airport advertising. I am also responsible for creating and sustaining the trading model throughout our airport sell

experiences.title: Business Director of Airports
experiences.description: Business Director of Primesight's Airport proposition across all specialists

experiences.title: Account Director
experiences.description: Brought on as Account Director for Airport Media to work across Kinetic and Talon business.  Moved with AM to Primesight in November 2016 as part of the acquisition

experiences.title: Global Account Manager
experiences.description:
Having joined The Work Perk my role is to maintain and grow existing client relationships, while also unearthing new opportunities across the market.

The Work Perk provides permission-based direct marketing to consumers at work, enabling brands to place their products on the desks of the Global workforce at times during the day when we can all use a perk! The company boasts a Worldwide network now reaching 60 million office workers and creates bespoke campaigns for a number of market leading brands.

The office environment represents a unique setting with minimal alternative advertising thus allowing our brand’s message and products to get unrivaled cut through. Recipient companies such as Google, The NHS, BBC, HSBC, MTV, Condé Nast and ASOS are incredibly grateful to receive the promotions and our brand’s products become a real talking point in the office.  The participants are then encouraged to discuss the product via social media and also complete a short survey that will be sent straight back to the client.  We have put together truly engaging campaigns for brand partners such as Pepsico, Unilever, Mondelez and Beiersdorf along with a huge variety of other companies that have all utilized our network to bring awareness to their product.

I am responsible for building and maintaining relationships with key brands and media agencies across the UK, Europe and North America.
experiences.location: 100 Lower Thames Street, Centennium House, EC3R 6DL

experiences.title: Business Manager
experiences.description: Protecting and growing revenue streams for Eye Corp's OOH portfolio through mobile, category specific, innovation (creating bespoke briefs to help increase awareness and sales within media agencies) and digital media.

education.description: I studied Journalism at University achieving a 2:1.  Despite me continuing to enjoy writing in my spare time I soon realised that the world of journalism wasn't for me and couldn't be happier with my decision in pursuing a career in advertising. And I can honestly say that's not just because of the continuous benefits of the job (although the 'work jollies' do help) but purely because sales is something my personality and work ethic is perfectly tailored towards.
education.activities_and_societies: Activities and Societies: Key member of Pluto, the student magazine, member of the Uclan football team.

volunteer_work.title: Climbing Instructor
volunteer_work.description: Fun and very fulfilling.  Easily one of the best summers of my life...

recommendations:
Phil Kennedy

I worked with Joe when he workd at Eye Airports / Primesight and I  at Rapport. His deep understanding of the OOH Market always ensured that the solutions he provided us with were always on point and tightly matched our clients needs. Joe is very personable and quickly became popular amongst the wider team.

Jim Cohen

Joe is a passionate and enthusiastic member of the sales team who excels at building relationships at all levels. 

Joe is excellent at presenting and offers a natural and relaxed style presenting to small and large groups. 

Joe has a tenacious attitude towards sales, massively target driven, Joe has demonstrated a focused and strategic manner of working that has resulted in much deserved personal success for him at Eye Airports.
